data.current_description: Search for threat actors by name or alias.

data.current_summary: Get YARA rules for a malware family
data.current_description: Returns YARA rules associated with a specific malware family. Requires authentication.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve YARA detection rules for malware family
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves YARA detection rules associated with a specific malware family identified by family_id. Requires API key authentication. Returns a collection of YARA rule objects that can be used for malware detection and analysis. Rules are maintained by Fraunhofer FKIE and updated as new variants are identified. No side effects or state changes occur.
data.reasoning: Original description mentions authentication but lacks clarity on input parameter (family_id), output format (collection of rules), and context about rule maintenance. Enhanced version specifies the parameter requirement, clarifies the return type, provides domain context about rule curation, and explicitly notes the read-only nature of the operation for AI agent clarity.
